name: 截短霰弹枪 | 荒野公主
nameZh: 截短霰弹枪 | 荒野公主
descriptionEn: The classic Sawed-Off deals very heavy close-range damage, but with its low accuracy, high spread and slow rate of fire, you'd better kill what you hit. Someone has been keeping track of kills on the barrel. A perfect gift for the sociopath that has everything...
descriptionZh: 经典的截短霰弹枪拥有强大的近距离杀伤力，但同时也有着低精准，高散布和低射速的特点，你最好能迅速解决掉你击中的“地方”。 有人一直在用枪管记录着杀敌人数。 献给反社会者的完美而又一应俱全的礼物……
